scripts.prod: npm run create-dist && npm run minify-glsl && npm run build && node scripts/wrap.js && npm run terser && node scripts/replace.js && npm run html && npm run zip
scripts.dev: npm run create-dist && shx cp ./src/shaders/* ./dist/shaders && npm run build && shx cp ./dist/game-concatenated.js ./dist/safe-space.min.js && node scripts/replace.js && npm run html
scripts.coverage: npm run create-dist && shx cp ./src/shaders/* ./dist/shaders && npm run build && npm run instrument && shx cp ./dist/nyc/dist/game-concatenated.js ./dist/safe-space.min.js && node scripts/replace.js && npm run html
scripts.minify-glsl: glsl-minifier -sT vertex -i ./src/shaders/vertexShader.glsl -o ./dist/shaders/vertexShader.glsl && glsl-minifier -sT fragment -i ./src/shaders/fragmentShader.glsl -o ./dist/shaders/fragmentShader.glsl && glsl-minifier -sT fragment -i ./src/shaders/perlinFragmentShader.glsl -o ./dist/shaders/perlinFragmentShader.glsl && glsl-minifier -sT vertex -i ./src/shaders/perlinVertexShader.glsl -o ./dist/shaders/perlinVertexShader.glsl
scripts.zip: shx mkdir -p ./dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021 && shx cp ./dist/index.html ./dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021/index.html && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path './dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021.zip') { Remove-Item './dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path './dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021' -DestinationPath './dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021.zip'" && shx ls ./dist/safe-space-eric-rowell-js13k-2021.zip
